subject: Math
skill: Fluency With Addition and Subtraction Within 20

lesson.story_mission: Help the Fact Family Festival light up quick mental-math paths.
lesson.mini_lesson: Build fluency within 20 by using make-10, doubles, near doubles, related facts, and missing-part strategies.
lesson.objective: Fluently add and subtract within 20 using mental strategies.
lesson.concept_explanation: Fluent math uses known facts to solve quickly and accurately without counting every object.
lesson.common_misconception: A child may count all instead of using a strategy or may mix up the whole and the missing part.
lesson.real_world_connection: Facts within 20 help with games, sharing snacks, and quick classroom math.
lesson.lesson_summary: Choose a strategy, solve the fact, and use a related fact to check.
hints: Look for a friendly fact such as make 10, doubles, or a related fact.
Use the known fact to solve the unknown number.
Check that the parts and whole make sense.

hint_ladder: Look for a friendly fact such as make 10, doubles, or a related fact.
Use the known fact to solve the unknown number.
Check that the parts and whole make sense.

misconception_bank.make_ten_confusion: Learner may split numbers incorrectly when making 10.
misconception_bank.doubles_confusion: Learner may mix up doubles and near doubles.
misconception_bank.related_fact_confusion: Learner may not connect addition and subtraction facts.
misconception_bank.missing_part_confusion: Learner may confuse the whole and a missing part.
